  * Edit and elevate writing across Circle; you can take rough work from our founders, marketing, and sales and turn it into something thumb-stopping, punchy and delightful to read

### What you'll need to be successful

  * Strong alignment with our values, [find our values on our career page](https://circle.so/careers) if you haven’t read up on them yet
  * You are proficient in English (spoken, written, and reading) at a [CEFR Level C2](https://magoosh.com/english-speaking/english-proficiency-levels-a-guide-to-determining-your-level/) / [ILR Level 5](https://www.govtilr.org/).
  * 7+ years in copywriting or creative roles.
  * A portfolio with standout campaign thinking and execution: concepts, systems, and executions.
  * Ability to clearly present and sell creative concepts to senior leadership and stakeholders with clear rationale, data, and creative conviction.
  * Proven ability to write in multiple modes: inspirational, minimal, technical, humorous, urgent—while staying on brand.
  * Experience shaping a brand’s voice and scaling it across teams and channels.
  * Strong storytelling instincts, and ability to weave the narrative with brand, product, and business goals.
  * Comfort operating at scale: multiple stakeholders, shifting timelines, and rigorous review processes.
  * Excellent collaboration skills with product, design, brand, growth, and C-Suite leadership.
  * Experience juggling multiple timelines and stakeholders; manage your own workload with minimal supervision.
  * Speed with standards: You can produce high-quality drafts quickly, iterate fast based on feedback and data, and still maintain a high bar for clarity, accuracy, and craft.
  * Strong cultural literacy and an inclusive, intentional approach to language.
  * Use AI to explore ideas, iterate on copy, and push your creative quality higher.

### Bonus points

  * Experience working in the creator space or directly with creators 
  * Experience working in SaaS

### $120,000 - $130,000 USD per year

_The cash compensation range shown is a starting point. In addition to equity,
benefits and perks, your cash compensation is subject to an annual review and
increase on a once per year basis._

### The fun stuff

  * Fully remote: work from anywhere in the world!
  * Autonomy and trust to do your job: we care about outcomes over everything else.
  * Paid time away: all employees are given 35 days of PTO annually. We also offer a paid sabbatical after 5 years.
  * Generous U.S. benchmarked compensation and startup equity no matter where you are in the world.*
  * Awesome medical coverage with 100% coverage for you and your family, or medical reimbursement options where applicable!*
  * Parental leave for parents expanding their family, or just starting one.
  * Home office stipend to help you get up and running.
  * Learning & development stipend to help you level up your professional skills.
  * Annual bonus potential for roles that don't already receive variable income or commission.
  * Company retreats: Twice a year, the Circle team gets together for a fully paid company retreat in incredible places around the world! We’ve had past retreats in Colombia, Portugal, and Mexico, with more planned on the horizon.
  * Check out our [Careers](https://careers.circle.so/) page for more.

*_Your role, location and unique circumstance may affect this._

### **Candidate Safety & Interview Process Notice**

At Circle, the safety and trust of our candidates is extremely important to
us. Unfortunately, recruiting fraud is increasingly common in the job market,
and bad actors sometimes impersonate companies or employees.

  
To help protect you, here’s what you can expect from our hiring process:

**How Our Process Works**

  * All applications are submitted through our official applicant tracking system (Greenhouse).
  * If selected to move forward, you may be invited to record a short introductory video, or directly into a live interview.
  * All live interviews are conducted face-to-face over video (Zoom or Google Meet) with a member of the Circle team.
  * We do **not** conduct text-only interviews.
  * We do **not** conduct interviews via chat apps or messaging platforms.
  * We do **not** use AI bots to interview candidates.

**Official Communication Channels**

  * All official communication from Circle will come from [no-reply@circle.co](mailto:no-reply@us.greenhouse-mail.io), or an email address ending in @circle.co or @circle.so.
  * We will never contact you from unofficial domains (such as “.team”, “.careers”, or similar variations).
  * We will never request sensitive personal information early in the process, or ask for payment of any kind.

If you receive a suspicious message claiming to be from Circle, please do not
respond.

  
We appreciate your vigilance, and look forward to connecting with you through
our official channels.

### Diversity, Equity & Inclusion

As a fully-remote international company, diversity is baked into our DNA.
Here’s how our CEO, Sid Yadav, frames our hiring mission: “let’s find talent
in underserved and under-represented corners of the world, set them up to do
the best work of their lives, and in turn, change their life.” To achieve this
hiring mission, we offer competitive U.S. benchmarked compensation no matter
where someone’s located in the world, and we proactively seek candidates who
expand representation of backgrounds, cultures and lived experiences in our
teams.

### Equal Employment Opportunity

Circle is an equal opportunity employer and as such, we do not discriminate on
the basis of race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity,
national origin, age, disability, or any other characteristic protected by
applicable laws. If you require any accommodations during the recruitment
process, please let us know and we will work with you to meet your needs.

### How We Use Candidate Data

At Circle, we are committed to protecting your personal information. As a job
applicant, the personal data you provide to us is collected and processed in
accordance with the **General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR)** in the EU
and the **California Consumer Privacy Act (CCPA)**. This notice outlines the
types of personal information we collect, the purpose for collecting it, and
your rights.

**Information We Collect:** We collect the following categories of personal
information from job applicants:

  * Contact information (such as name, email address, phone number)
  * Employment history and qualifications
  * Education history
  * References and any other information you choose to share with us during the application process

**Purpose of Collection:** We collect this information for the following
purposes:

  * To assess your qualifications and suitability for the position
  * To communicate with you during the recruitment process
  * To comply with legal and regulatory obligations

**Your Rights Under GDPR and CCPA:** You have the following rights regarding
your personal information:

  * The right to request access to the personal information we hold about you.
  * The right to request the deletion of your personal information, subject to certain legal exceptions.
  * The right to opt out of the sale of your personal information (Note: We do not sell personal information).

For more information about how we handle your personal data or to exercise
your rights, please refer to our full [Privacy
Policy](https://circle.so/privacy).

By submitting your application, you acknowledge that you have read and
understood this privacy notice.

### **About Us**

Parity is one of the world’s most experienced companies building the core
infrastructure behind blockchain - the system that allows information and
value to be shared securely without needing an intermediary. We’re laying the
foundation for a better web which respects the freedom and data of
individuals, and empowers developers to build better, more trustworthy online
services.

Our remote-first, global team develop open-source software that anyone can use
or improve. This includes Polkadot, Polkadot SDK, and Kusama - key parts of
the Web3 tech stack, the next generation of the internet. Our mission is to
make Polkadot the most active and innovative community in blockchain, powering
a new era of connected and decentralised applications.

**About the Team**

This role sits in our O/S department, home to the teams that support Parity’s
growth, people, and operations.

Reporting into our Chief of Staff, Stuart Macdonald, you’ll be joining our
Communications team. The team focuses on producing, coordinating, and
distributing content across multiple channels, ensuring Parity’s messaging is
clear, consistent, and aligned across product, engineering, and brand
initiatives.

**About the Role**

As a Content & Communications Associate, you will support the execution and
coordination of content across multiple channels, working closely with the
Content Manager and internal stakeholders to ensure timely, consistent, and
high-quality communications.

**What you’ll do**

  * Draft and format content for social media, blog posts, and external communications

  * Support the creation and adaptation of technical and product-related content in collaboration with engineering and product teams

  * Assist in managing the content and social media calendar, ensuring timely publishing across channels

  * Coordinate content assets (copy, visuals, approvals) and publish updates across Parity’s platforms and website

  * Conduct research on industry trends, ecosystem developments, and competitors to support content planning

  * Support PR activities including press materials, media research, outreach coordination, and tracking media coverage

  * Track basic content performance metrics and support reporting on content effectiveness

**Your skills**

  * Demonstrated ability to write and edit clear, structured content in English, including adapting tone for different audiences and channels

  * Experience working with or around technical subject matter, with the ability to understand and simplify complex concepts

  * Evidence of managing multiple content tasks or workflows (e.g. content calendars, publishing schedules, coordination with stakeholders)

  * Experience collaborating with multiple stakeholders and incorporating feedback into final content outputs

  * Strong attention to detail, demonstrated through consistently accurate, well-structured written work

**Nice to have**

  * Experience with CMS platforms (e.g. WordPress)

  * Familiarity with social media management tools (e.g. Buffer, Typefully)

  * Experience using tools such as Notion, Figma, or analytics dashboards

  * Experience supporting content performance tracking or reporting

### **About Working With Us**

Joining Parity means joining team mates who are genuinely excited about the
impact their projects are having, and the opportunity to grow alongside some
of the brightest minds in the Web3 space! You’ll work remotely and flexibly,
while still getting to meet your team mates throughout the year at team and
company-wide retreats.

Upon receiving an offer, all candidates **undergo a background check** through
[Zinc](https://zincwork.com/candidates), our trusted third-party provider.
Team members will be taken on as **a contractor via our UK entity**. View our
[Applicant Notice](https://www.parity.io/applicant-notice/) to see how we use
your data.

Parity is an Equal Opportunity Employer. **We welcome diversity** in our
global team and care about everyone in our collective feeling included and
welcome

Is this position not quite your match? [Browse](https://www.parity.io/jobs/)
our other open roles.

descContent:
DAO Ops team is a pivotal group of contributors dedicated to facilitating the
operations of the DAO. This involves inventing and implementing efficient
processes to ensure seamless decision-making for Lido DAO token holders.

Within Lido, there are various contributor teams working on different
projects. Most of these projects require approval from the DAO, a process that
can be quite complex. The role of DAO Ops Managers is to assist these teams in
smoothly navigating this process.

By providing guidance and support, DAO Ops managers ensure that the necessary
steps are taken for proposals to be properly approved and executed within the
DAO's governance framework. This involves _working closely with contributors_
to understand their needs, _align them with DAO requirements_ , and
_facilitate the coordination of tasks_ to streamline decision-making
processes.

This is an asynchronous remote position and hours may vary, but be advised
that most meetings occur between UTC 0-+6. If you're applying from a location
where these hours are outside your usual working hours, we expect you to adapt
to our meeting times.

### **Key Scope**

These superheroes:

  * Design processes

  * Manage projects

  * Have a bird's-eye view of how the protocol and all processes around it work

  * Liaise with other contributor teams and the community

  * Support on-chain transactions

  * Facilitate the overall function of the DAO, including sub-governance groups

The ideal candidate will primarily focus on supporting the decision-making
process within the DAO. This involves:

  * Advising stakeholders on proposal feasibility

  * Ensuring the timely progression of stages

  * Suggesting best practices

  * Resolving any impasses that may arise

### **Requirements**

  *  _Strong Organizational Skills_ : The ideal candidate should be adept at setting and meeting deadlines and possess a high level of responsibility.

  * _Technical Background_ : The candidate should be familiar with Python and/or JavaScript and hold a degree in Mathematics, Applied Mathematics, or Computer Science.

  * _Proficient in English_ : Excellent command of English is essential for reading, negotiating, and communicating effectively.

  * _Exceptional Writing Skills_ : The ability to craft documents and texts in English is crucial.

  * _Fast Learner_ : Given the fast nature of the field, the candidate should demonstrate a strong ability to quickly grasp complex concepts.

  * _Passion for Crypto_ : A genuine interest in cryptocurrency and a desire to contribute to our team.

  * Russian language will be a plus.

### **Key Factors**

  * Work from anywhere in the world

  * Competitive fees in $

  * Flexible schedule

  * Equipment & co-working reimbursement capabilities

  * Overseas conferences, community immersion

### **Join the VRChat Team!**

VRChat offers a first-of-its-kind, game-changing platform that provides an
endless collection of social VR experiences and gives the power of creation to
its robust community. With over 250,000 worlds and growing, VRChat’s vision is
to allow users to bring their imaginations to life and help shape the
metaverse anywhere in the world on any device. VRChat has raised $100M to date
with the support of investors Makers Fund, Anthos Capital, and HTC and is
building out a strong team to achieve hyper-growth in the coming years.

### **Job Overview**

We are looking for a Senior Recruiter, Contract (20 hours/week) to support
hiring across a targeted set of roles spanning Engineering, Design, and
Product.

This role is focused on full-cycle recruiting execution, with responsibility
for running searches from intake through close in partnership with hiring
managers and a recruiting coordinator. The ideal candidate is comfortable
operating independently, managing multiple roles, and delivering consistent
progress across active searches.

### **Job & Team Impact**

In this role, you will help ensure that priority hires are made efficiently by
driving day-to-day recruiting execution. This includes building and managing
pipelines, keeping candidates engaged, and maintaining momentum across
interview processes.

You will play a key role in helping the team stay organized and
responsive—surfacing insights from the market, identifying gaps in pipelines,
and ensuring hiring teams are able to make timely decisions.

  
  

###  Duties & Responsibilities

* Own full-cycle recruiting across assigned roles, partnering with hiring managers to scope positions, align on candidate profiles, and drive hiring strategy

* Build and manage high-quality pipelines across technical, product, and creative roles, using a mix of sourcing and inbound channels

* Act as a thought partner to hiring teams, providing market insights, candidate calibration, and guidance throughout the hiring process

* Drive searches to close, managing candidate engagement, offer strategy, and negotiations in competitive situations

* Maintain clear visibility into pipeline health and progress, proactively identifying risks and unblocking searches

* Partner with the Recruiting Coordinator to ensure efficient process execution and a smooth candidate experience

* Identify and implement improvements to Recruiting workflows, helping the team operate more effectively

,

### Experience, Skills & Qualifications

* 5+ years of full-cycle recruiting experience

* Experience hiring across a mix of technical, product, and/or creative roles

* Demonstrated ability to partner closely with hiring managers, influencing role scoping, candidate calibration, and hiring decisions

* Proven success in closing candidates in competitive markets, including managing multiple stakeholders and navigating offer negotiations

* Ability to operate independently in a lean environment, managing multiple searches and driving consistent progress with minimal oversight

* Strong sourcing capabilities and ability to build high-quality pipelines across multiple functions

* Experience using data and market insights to inform hiring strategy and improve outcomes

* Excellent communication, organization, and stakeholder management skills

* Experience working with Applicant Tracking Systems (ATS)

,

### Bonus Points

* Experience recruiting for consumer, social, or platform-based products

* Exposure to hiring in areas like trust & safety, content moderation, or community-focused roles

* Experience supporting both technical and creative organizations

* Prior experience in a contract or embedded recruiting role

* Experience working for a startup or high-growth tech company while developing a high-performing team.

* Demonstrated interest in VR, online communities, or be a VRChat user and creator!

* Knowing how our platform and community works

,

### How we Work

Work from anywhere! VRChat is a 100% remote company.

_VRChat is an equal-opportunity employer, and we welcome applicants from all
backgrounds. VRChat fosters a diverse, creative, and collaborative environment
where anyone can contribute to any of the ongoing projects or direction of the
roadmap at any time. If you’re a passionate team player who wants to have an
impact on a dynamic team, we’d love to hear from you!_

_Offers are subject to satisfactory background and reference checks._

descContent:
## About This Role

Data Group Inc. is hiring a WordPress Developer for part-time remote client
work across corporate, marketing, and conversion-focused web properties. This
role is best suited to someone who can independently ship custom WordPress
functionality, improve performance and security, and collaborate with design,
content, and project stakeholders in a consulting environment.This position is
fully remote within the United States and follows a flexible part-time
schedule with regular u.s. eastern time overlap.

## Responsibilities:

\- Build, extend, and maintain custom WordPress websites, themes, blocks, and
plugins for client engagements

\- Translate approved designs and content requirements into responsive,
production-ready templates and components

\- Optimize site speed, accessibility, and technical SEO across desktop and
mobile experiences

\- Troubleshoot plugin conflicts, deployment issues, and production bugs with
minimal supervision

\- Integrate third-party services such as CRMs, forms, analytics, scheduling,
and marketing automation tools

\- Perform routine updates, security hardening, backups, and QA before release

\- Document implementation details, reusable components, and support handoff
notes

\- Collaborate with project managers, designers, and stakeholders to keep
delivery on scope and on schedule

  

## Requirements:

\- 3+ years of professional WordPress development experience in production
environments

\- Strong proficiency with PHP, JavaScript, HTML5, CSS3/SCSS, and responsive
front-end development

\- Hands-on experience building custom themes, Gutenberg blocks, and plugins
from scratch

\- Working knowledge of WordPress REST API, custom post types, ACF/meta
fields, and headless-friendly patterns

\- Experience with WooCommerce or other payment, form, CRM, and marketing tool
integrations

\- Strong understanding of performance optimization, Core Web Vitals, caching,
image optimization, and CDN workflows

\- Experience applying WordPress security best practices, update management,
and vulnerability mitigation

\- Familiarity with technical SEO, accessibility standards, and cross-browser
QA

\- Proficiency with Git-based workflows and modern deployment practices

\- Ability to manage priorities independently in a remote, client-facing -
environment with regular U.S. Eastern Time overlap

  

## Benefits & Perks:

\- Fully remote part-time schedule with outcome-based planning

\- Competitive hourly compensation aligned to U.S. market benchmarks for
experienced WordPress talent

\- Steady project variety across B2B, enterprise, and marketing-focused web
builds

\- Structured Git-based workflow with modern tools and clear review processes

\- Opportunity to expand into broader CMS, integration, and web-platform work
over time

\- Direct collaboration with experienced delivery and client teams

\- Long-term engagement potential as project volume grows

  

Please mention the word **GLORIOUS** when applying to show you read the job
post completely (#RMTA2LjIwMi43OC4xMDM=). This is a feature to avoid fake spam
applicants. Companies can search these words to find applicants that read this
and instantly see they're human.  
  

## Salary and compensation

  
$80,000 — $110,000/year  
  

## Benefits

💰 401(k)

🖥 Home office budget

💰 Profit sharing

👀 No monitoring system

🎅 We hire old (and young)

postTitle: [全职远程工作 ] AI 写作应用前端开发（限 3 - 5 年左右工作经验）
descContent:
### 写在招聘信息之前的话

我们是一支国内为数不多的不依赖融资，完全靠自身独立发展的远程产品创新团队。我们立足于为人们提供优秀的、富有创新的软件产品，提升人们生活和工作的创造力，已经历史
13 年，旗下有三款享誉国内外的 App：Zine ，Varlens ，Lattics
，官网：[auramarker.com](https://auramarker.com)，可以深入了解

我们倡导 Enjoy Work ，Enjoy Life ，并在实践中践行之：

  * 成员分布在多个城市，通过互联网紧密地协同工作，不打卡不坐班，以任务目标驱动；
  * 倡导 Better ，Faster ，Smarter 的工作风格，不安排节假日加班，更倡导周末多陪伴家人和充电学习；
  * 注重深思熟虑，提前计划，高效率高质量的一次性把工作做好，减少无谓的试错和可避免的弯路；
  * 持续学习与持续创新，保持独立见解，了解行业与技术发展，但不盲从，持续改进自己的工作方法，不断提升工作效率与质量，追求零缺陷；
  * 将良好的设计品味、先进的技术，以及具有乐趣的使用体验，三者融合在一起的产品理念，创作真正能够给人们的生活带来便利，激发人们的创造力和生活品质的产品，并由此获得可持续发展的收入。

由于我们奉行远程工作，而每个人的工作经验和生活城市不同，因此没有列出薪酬水平，会以各自的实际期望评估，达成一致。我们期望寻找长期的合作伙伴，寻找外包和短期工作的也请勿扰，谢谢。

\------ 职位招聘 ------

### 全职 前端开发工程师：1 位

#### 职位说明:

  * 参与团队的 AI 写作产品的移动端和桌面端版本开发（跨平台）；
  * 工作 3-5 年，本科以上学历，无需计算机专业背景，但需要对软件技术非常有热情，有较强的自学能力；
  * 熟练使用 Coding Agent 辅助编码和定位问题，并有一套自己的 AI 工作规范和流程；
  * 工作超过 5 年的，如果富有创造力，mindset flexible ，能够灵活且快速地改进工作方法，具备技术创新能力的也可以考虑；
  * 精通 JavaScript/TypeScript 、HTML 、CSS ，熟悉 Node.js ；
  * 熟悉富文本编辑器 / React / Electron 三者之一的开发经验；
  * 深度参与过三个以上前端项目，能准确理解需求，具备扎实的软件基础，架构分析和设计、系统分析思维，并且有良好的编码风格和工程规范，追求代码执行效率，了解各种数据结构和算法；
  * 具有良好的品味，对影响用户体验的细节有自觉的觉察力，精益求精；
  * 熟悉 W3C 标准，熟悉主流浏览器特性，对 Web 技术趋势等有较为深刻的理解；
  * 了解软件开发过程，熟悉敏捷开发过程、了解 Scrum 和 DevOps 等软件工程方法和最佳实践；
  * 良好的代码阅读能力和英文阅读能力，能阅读并理解英文资料；
  * 能够长期的进行远程工作，良好的自我目标管理和自我情绪管理能力，有良好的抗压能力，有团队协作精神，和良好的审美；
  * 非常熟悉开源社区，有自己的技术博客或者 github 开源项目，并有深度见解和价值贡献的加分；
  * 有过 AI 应用前端开发经验的加分；

### 以上职位可以享受的福利:

  * 远程工作，与家人在一起，并且不将自己限定在某个城市和空间，可以自由旅行；
  * 目标管理而非时间管理，可以自己更好的平衡工作和生活；
  * 可以挑战一切认为不合理或者可以做的更好的地方，拥有很大发言权，团队会倾听你的高见；
  * 工作出色会有激励股权，享受团队一起长期携手努力和成长的红利；

### 可能遇到的挑战:

  * 长期远程工作对自身的沟通能力、理解能力、以及学习能力都是巨大的挑战，因为很多事情需要主动的沟通和交流，以及主动的学习，并非很多人适合；
  * 长期的远程工作会带来孤独感，因此更适合已经组建了家庭，并且有着自己广泛兴趣爱好和成熟的社交圈子的人士。

如果对以上职位感兴趣的，欢迎联系我们，请将你的简历发至我们的招聘邮箱：[**hr@auramarker.com**](/cdn-cgi/l/email-
protection#a28d8dcad0e2c3d7d0c3cfc3d0c9c7d08cc1cdcf)

欢迎感兴趣的同学联系咨询，请添加微信：blackboxo （备注：实习申请+学校+姓名）

### **About this role**

Ship kernel code that runs on millions of devices worldwide. You'll work
directly on upstream Linux development for a flagship consumer product while
contributing to the broader kernel community. This isn't just maintenance
work, you'll be solving hard problems and your code goes upstream. This role
suits an engineer who wants to go deep: you will have the space to develop
genuine subsystem expertise, build your upstream profile and grow into
technical leadership over time.

This role combines deep technical work with collaborative consulting. You will
partner with client engineering teams to solve their toughest kernel
challenges while championing upstream-first approaches.

### **About this role**

Ship kernel code that runs on millions of devices worldwide. You'll work
directly on upstream Linux development for a flagship consumer product while
contributing to the broader kernel community. This isn't just maintenance
work, you'll be solving hard problems and your code goes upstream. This role
suits an engineer who wants to go deep: you will have the space to develop
genuine subsystem expertise, build your upstream profile and grow into
technical leadership over time.

This role combines deep technical work with collaborative consulting. You will
partner with client engineering teams to solve their toughest kernel
challenges while championing upstream-first approaches.

**Location:** Fully remote (preference for EU or East Coast US hours)

**Travel:** Optional conference attendance

### What you'll actually do

* **Upstream First:** Contribute directly to mainline Linux kernel development: schedulers, power management, device drivers and core subsystems
* **Real-World Impact:** Support and optimise Linux for extremely popular consumer devices used by millions of people
* **Solve Hard Problems:** Make Linux do things it can't currently do. Push the boundaries of what is possible to mould Linux to suit new use cases. Tackle device failures without the luxury of a stack trace, relying on experience and intuition. Just because Linux doesn't do it currently, doesn't mean we can't invent it.
* **Community Collaboration:** Work with upstream maintainers and represent Collabora at conferences
* **Client Partnership:** Translate customer needs into technical solutions while advocating for upstream-first approaches. You'll help clients understand why investing in upstream benefits their long-term goals
* **Navigate Constraints:** Balance technical excellence with real-world pressures: customer deadlines, hardware limitations, business priorities, while keeping code quality high
* **Be a Technical Advisor:** Explain complex kernel decisions to product teams, provide honest timelines and build trust through transparent communication

### What we're looking for

#### **Required**

  * **Product support experience,** you are comfortable diagnosing and resolving issues reported by end-users which often require dedication to reproduce from vague bug reports and limited reproduction steps
  * **Solid Linux kernel development experience** ,**** you have spent meaningful time working in the kernel and are comfortable navigating unfamiliar subsystems independently. You do not need to have seen everything, but you should know how to find your way. We are looking for someone who is still building their reputation in the upstream community and wants a role that accelerates that.
  * **Strong English communication skills,** both spoken and written for patch reviews, documentation and client discussions
  * **Self-directed work style** \- you thrive in a remote, asynchronous environment

#### Nice to have

  * **Upstream contribution history** ,**** we know not every employer makes this easy. If you haven't had the opportunity yet, we'll help you build that profile as part of the role
  * **Consultancy or client-facing technical background,** you know how to balance technical excellence with business constraints, explain kernel internals to product teams, manage expectations across multiple projects and advocate for upstream solutions while respecting customer timelines
  * Experience with **schedulers, power management, Bluetooth, WiFi or audio subsystems**
  * Familiarity with **CI/CD for kernel testing** (KernelCI, Jenkins, LAVA)
  * Background in **BSP development or board bring-up**
  * **Distribution experience** (Arch, Debian, Yocto, Buildroot)
  * **Rust programming skills**

### What we offer

#### **Compensation & Benefits**

We offer a competitive benefits package tailored to each country in which we
have employees, plus a core global benefit offering accessible to all
Collaborans. Our core benefits include:

* **Competitive salary** \- Salary is location-dependent and benchmarked against local market data. We ask candidates to share their expectations during the application process and engage with those honestly
* **Conference attendance** \- we cover expenses and encourage speaking opportunities
* **Open source time** \- contribute to projects you care about
* **Office setup budget**
* **Sabbatical/Retention of Services** , available after five years continuous service
* **Co-working policy** -**** support for working outside home
* **Wellness assessments -** biannual well-being assessments with a trained mental health specialist

#### Work Environment

* **Fully remote** \- work where you’re most productive
* **Global team** \- engineers across Europe, Americas and Asia
* **No on-call rotations** \- while the role involves supporting client engineering teams, there are no on-call rotations or out-of-hours incident response expectations
* **Flexible hours** \- manage your own schedule

#### Growth & Impact

* **Upstream contributions** \- your work shapes Linux, not just client products
* **Technical leadership track** \- path to principal engineer, subsystem expertise or technical architecture roles
* **Consulting track** \- develop deeper client relationships, lead customer engagements or shape service offerings
* **Mentorship opportunities** \- both receiving and providing guidance
* **Conference speaking** \- we support presentation submissions and provide coaching
* **Recognition** \- your contributions are public, building your professional reputation

#### Culture & Values

* **Upstream first** \- we believe the best solutions benefit everyone
* **Transparency** \- open discussion about technical decisions, business constraints and project challenges
* **Pragmatism** \- perfect is the enemy of good; we ship quality code that solves real problems
* **Respect for expertise** \- we trust engineers to make technical decisions
* **Collaborative** \- we succeed by working together, internally and with the community
* **Sustainable pace** \- we're here for the long haul, not death marches

### A day in the life

#### **Morning (your timezone)**

* Review overnight mailing-list discussions on your subsystem(s)
* Triage new customer issue reports
* Respond to client question about kernel panic they're investigating
* Pair debug session with colleague on tricky scheduler behaviour

#### **Midday**

* Deep work: finish patch series for power management optimisation
* Quick video call with customer team to explain your proposed approach and timeline
* Review and test colleague's patch before they submit upstream

#### **Afternoon**

* Respond to upstream maintainer feedback on your RFC patch
* Update client on progress, discuss trade-offs between fast fix vs. upstream-ready solution
* Join optional team "office hours" to discuss architecture decision
* Write kernel commit message that explains the "why" for future maintainers

Some days are deep technical work, others involve more client communication.
You'll balance both based on project needs and your strengths.

### Our Interview Process

We respect your time and provide a clear, structured process:

  1. **Application Review** (within 1 week) - we look at your code and contributions
  2. **Initial Chat** (30 min) - casual conversation about your experience and our work
  3. **Technical Interview** (2 - 3h) 
    1. **Technical Deep-Dive** \- discuss kernel architecture, past debugging challenges and how you approach problem-solving (no whiteboard coding)
    2. **Code Review Session** \- review real patches together, discuss trade-offs
    3. **Client Scenario Discussion** \- talk through a realistic customer situation: balancing technical debt, timeline pressure and upstream goals. We want to see your thought process, not a "right answer"
  4. **Head of Open Source Software Consulting team Discussion**(60 min) - meet the Head of Open Source Software Consulting team, ask about day-to-day work and how Collabora works, discuss compensation and benefits
  5. **Offer** (1 week of final interview)

**Total timeline:** 3-4 weeks from application to offer

#####

#### What happens next?

* Initial response within 1 week
* Even if we don't move forward, we'll tell you why

### Collabora's Commitment

We're committed to building a diverse team and inclusive environment. We
encourage applications from people under-represented in tech.

We evaluate candidates based on skills and contributions, not pedigree. If
you're unsure whether you qualify, apply anyway—imposter syndrome is real and
you might be exactly who we're looking for.

We recognise that the combination of deep kernel expertise and consulting
skills is rare. If you have strong kernel development experience and are newer
to the consulting side of the role, or vice versa, we want to hear from you.
We can develop one if the other is solid.

Work from anywhere, impact everywhere

Diversity is at the heart of who we are at Xapo Bank. We’re a fully
distributed team of over 130 Xapiens that work remotely from 30+ countries
around the world.

Our beginning: A world that enjoys economic freedom and wealth protection, no
matter where you live or who is running your country.

To achieve that, we search the world for the best people for the job. We work
hard, think globally, and inspire each other to learn and grow. We are
committed to changing the way things are done.

_Although we are headquartered in Gibraltar, this is a full time, 100% remote
position  
_ _Work from anywhere!_

**_Position overview_**

This internship is an exciting opportunity for students who are still studying
and eager to gain hands-on experience in the Client Coverage Group (CCG)
division of an established fintech with a global client base across both
Retail & Institutional customers. Our interns will gain invaluable experience
into how we operate a global sales division across multiple target client
segments with our suite of regulated financial products and services.

**Key Details**

  * **Duration:** 2 Months (July 6th to August 28th)
  * **Location:** While we support a remote setup, interns must be based in Gibraltar for the duration of the program.
  * **Mandatory Onboarding:** Physical attendance is required for our onboarding sessions on July 6th and 7th.

**What You'll Do**

As a Client Coverage Group Intern, you will gain insights into how we set our
overall sales strategy and how we optimise our revenues from our existing
client base. Exposure will include, helping define our overall strategy
through assessing how we identify target addressable market (TAM), how we
implement our sales strategy around this TAM, how we acquire new clients and
also upsell to our existing clients, how we build a marketing and events
strategy and how we measure the impact of our efforts. As a regulated
financial services provider, this is a great opportunity to gain exposure to
the complexities of selling financial products into a global client base
through a targeted and disciplined sales and coverage strategy.

**_Responsibilities_**

  * Assist with market TAM analysis, by product on a regional and global level.
  * Assist with reviewing the impact of our current Sales and Upsell strategies and suggesting changes to help accelerate our impact to achieve our goals / KPIs.
  * Assist with the reporting of our sales and relationship management efforts. 
  * Assist the CCG team with client profiling, this will give you a great insight into how revenue driven teams prioritise their workloads and cover a global client base, at scale.

**_Skills needed_**

  * You are currently pursuing a degree in Business, Marketing, Communications, Economics, or a similar field.
  * You genuinely enjoy talking to people and helping them solve problems.
  * You have excellent written and verbal English skills, allowing you to write professional emails and chat confidently with the team.
  * You are curious about how fintechs grow their business and keep their clients happy.
  * You can handle multiple small tasks at once and stay on top of your daily "to-do" list.
  * You bring a "can-do" energy to the team and aren't afraid to jump in and help where needed.
  * Genuine thirst for knowledge and highly motivated to excel in a high paced work environment. 

**_Other requirements_**

  * A dedicated workspace.
  * A reliable internet connection with the fastest speed possible in your area.
  * Alignment with Our Values and the Xapo Values-Driven Leadership principles.

**Why work for Xapo?**

IMPACT GLOBALLY, WORK REMOTELY.

  * **Shape the Future:** Improve lives through cutting-edge technology, work 100% remotely from anywhere in the world.
  * **Great work-life balance:** Build amazing things with a balance of autonomy and collaborative teamwork. Set your own work schedule and make use of a flexible PTO plan when you need to recharge.
  * **Expect Excellence:** Collaborate, learn, and grow with a high-performance team. Learn how you learn best - from books to conferences, you’ll get a yearly budget for your individual learning and development goals.

**At Xapo, we prioritize consumer protection and adhere to regulatory
requirements by ensuring that all Xapiens are accountable for upholding
principles of fair treatment, transparency, and ethical conduct in their
interactions with customers and stakeholders.  
**

Camunda is the **leader in enterprise agentic automation, orchestrating
complex business processes** , including high-value knowledge work, across
agents, people, and systems. By creating production-ready, enterprise-grade
agents with built-in governance, Camunda uniquely delivers trusted AI agents
for business-critical processes. **Over 700 leading innovators like Atlassian,
ING, and Vodafone, rely on Camunda** to slash time-to-value from months to
days, boost operational efficiency, and elevate customer experiences. Camunda
was named a****_**Visionary**_**** in the inaugural [**2025 Gartner® Magic
Quadrant™**](https://page.camunda.com/wp-2025-gartner-magic-quadrant-for-
boat)**** for Business Orchestration and Automation Technologies (BOAT).

  

**As a fully remote, global company, we’re rewriting the rules of modern
business.** Named [GP Bullhound’s 2024 Top 100 Next Unicorn
list,](https://www.gpbullhound.com/articles/top-100-next-unicorns-the-uk-
france-and-germany-lead-with-the-most-promising-technology-companies-in-
europe/) certified as a **Great Place to Work** , and recognized by [Flexa for
true flexibility](https://flexa.careers/companies/camunda), we’re growing fast
and looking for top talent to join our team. If you’re excited to do
meaningful work and make real impact, keep reading, **this role could be the
one you’ve been waiting for.**

**About The Role**

We’re looking for an Enterprise**** Account Executive to help grow Camunda’s
footprint across ANZ, with a focus on the BFSI and Logistics/Retail sectors.
This is an exciting opportunity to join a high-performing, collaborative sales
team at a pivotal moment in our growth. You’ll work with forward-thinking
companies that are modernizing how they orchestrate business processes, often
mission-critical and complex, and you’ll help them see the value in Camunda’s
open, developer-friendly platform. If you’re energized by owning a strategic
region, building lasting relationships, and selling a product that’s reshaping
enterprise automation, we’d love to hear from you.

**What you’ll be doing:**

  * Driving ARR growth from new business and expansion of existing customers through complex sales cycles including; technical discovery and evaluations, presentations, financial and legal negotiations, and on-site customer meetings when necessary

  * Articulating Camunda’s value proposition and vision to multiple levels of technical and business leadership

  * Collaboration and partnering with Camunda Solutions Engineering, Product leaders, and Partners (GSI and Regional) to understand and support customer use cases

  * Leveraging multiple communication methods and collaboration with Account Development Representatives to create new contacts in middle and senior leadership in both technical and executive areas of the enterprise landscape.

**What you bring:**

  * 3+ years of experience and overachieving quota in ANZ in software sales (Enterprises >10,000 employees)

  * 3+ years of experience selling complex IT products or solutions and navigating complex buying centers across business and IT

  * Examples of successfully selling into IT and Business at C-level within Enterprise accounts

  * Expert in Sales Methodologies such as MEDDICC and Challenger Sales

  * Deep industry knowledge of BFSI a strong plus

  * Familiarity with Automation technology a plus

  * Track record of building new Pipeline generation via outbound campaigns

  * A strategic thinker who can create and lead successful execution of Account Plans

  * Strong collaborator, innovator and problem solver

 _**This role is an existing vacancy**_

#LI-LT1 #LI-Remote C3

**What We Have to Offer:**

**Compensation**

We offer competitive, fair, and transparent compensation. Salary ranges are
location-based, with Standard and Major markets (global tech hubs) reflecting
local competition.

**The Annual Total Target Cash**(base salary + 100% variable target, where
applicable) shown below spans from the minimum in a Standard market to the
maximum in a Major market. Final offers depend on **skills** , **experience**
, and **location** , and we typically hire in the first half of the range to
allow room for growth:

  * United States: $281,300.00 to $453,500.00 

  * United Kingdom: £176,600.00 to £290,500.00 

  * Singapore: S$349,400.00 to S$524,000.00

If you’re based elsewhere, you’ll be hired via
[**Remote.com**](http://Remote.com) (our global employer partner), and your
Talent Acquisition Partner will provide a personalized **Total Rewards
Calculator** after your first interview.

**Equity:** We also offer equity (where applicable) through our [**Virtual
Stock Option Plan
(VSOP)**](https://docs.google.com/document/d/1hoyQAPTZ5nV7J47D9n3yqK5hhLj160Xf36iyqEXNOWE/edit?tab=t.0#heading=h.2qon7r4kdfe1).

**Benefits & Perks**

We invest in your wellbeing, growth, and ability to connect, along with perks
that support you no matter where you’re based. Our benefits are globally
designed and locally delivered where applicable.

  * **Remote & Flexible: **Work from anywhere with the setup that suits you, **home office budget, co-working space support, and flexible time off** to recharge when you need it.

  * **In Person Connection:** We invest in meaningful face time through our **Annual Kickoff**(Vienna in 2025, Madrid in 2026!), **team offsites, and Camundi Connection Budgets** , including contributing to meetups while travelling,, and local gatherings with fellow Camundi.

  * **Health & Wellbeing:** Access locally tailored healthcare, **Modern Health** for global mental wellbeing, and our **Live Well Lifestyle Spending Account (LSA),** a flexible, global benefit that puts you in control of your whole life, not just work, from: **staying active, to caring for family, exploring personal passions, meaningful experiences, and investing in your financial wellbeing.** The Live Well program launches in 2026 and scales to **€1,000 annually from 2027**.

  * **Financial Security:** Retirement and pension plans (often with company contributions), plus life and disability insurance where relevant.

  * **Professional Growth:** Up to $/€/£1,000 per year for self-driven learning: courses, certifications, books, you decide!

_”Everyone is welcome at Camunda”_ — _it’s a celebrated component of our
culture. We strive to create an inclusive environment that empowers our
people. At Camunda, we honour diverse cultures and backgrounds and are proud
to be an equal opportunity employer. All qualified applicants will receive
consideration without regard to gender, race, ethnicity, religion, belief,
sexual orientation, age, disability or any other protected characteristics
under applicable law. We are looking forward to your application!_

_**Come join us and be part of Camunda’s incredible journey: Make an impact at
a pivotal moment in our story!**_

_AI Disclaimer: Camunda may use AI tools to aid the screening of
applications._

postTitle: 兼职远程招聘｜ [QA 测试工程师] ｜跨境电商 SaaS+AI 产品
descContent:
职位信息

  * 岗位：QA 测试工程师
  * 类型：兼职（远程）
  * 薪资：按工时结算（面议）
  * 团队规模：20 人创业团队，产品/技术/市场/运营齐备

背景 产品处于商业化快速迭代阶段，功能上线节奏快，后端系统也在同步做架构升级。我们希望引入一位专业的测试同学，从 0 到 1
建立质量保障流程，确保产品稳定交付。

主要工作

  1. 负责核心业务流程的功能测试与回归测试（订单、支付、营销活动、用户权限等），确保每次迭代上线质量可控。
  2. 设计和维护接口自动化测试用例，覆盖核心业务主流程和边界场景。
  3. 跟进产品需求评审，从测试视角提前识别风险点，输出测试方案。
  4. 参与线上问题复现与定位，能独立分析日志，定位到模块级别，减少开发排查成本。
  5. 逐步建立测试规范和回归机制，推动质量流程常态化。

我们希望你具备

  * 3 年以上测试经验，有完整的业务测试方法论（用例设计、边界分析、回归策略），不是纯点点点。
  * 熟练掌握接口测试工具（ Postman / JMeter / pytest 等），能独立编写和维护自动化用例。
  * 熟悉 MySQL 基本操作，能写 SQL 做数据验证和业务校验。
  * 理解 RESTful API ，能读懂接口文档，能自己构造测试数据。
  * 有电商或 SaaS 类产品测试经验，熟悉订单、支付、优惠、多角色权限等业务场景的测试要点。
  * 沟通清晰，能把问题描述准确（复现步骤、期望结果、实际结果），不需要开发反复追问。

加分项

  * 有 Go 项目测试经验，能读懂后端代码辅助定位问题。
  * 有性能测试经验（压测方案设计、并发场景验证、慢接口分析）。
  * 熟悉 Docker 环境，能自己搭建和管理测试环境。
  * 有 AI 辅助测试经验（用 AI 生成用例、分析覆盖率、辅助排查）。
  * 有数据迁移、灰度发布等变更场景的测试经验。

我们能提供

  * 产品市场需求很大，真正解决商家核心痛点。
  * 小团队扁平沟通，需求调研充分，决策路线清晰。
  * 兼职时间灵活，按实际工时结算。

postTitle: [远程长期]找个开发技术，后端 / 全栈开发 (Go + ClickHouse)
descContent:
项目背景： 开发一款高并发、处理海量时序数据的统计聚合 Web 平台。核心难点在于对外部海量第三方 API
进行动态的高频轮询抓取，并对千万级/亿级历史流水数据进行极其复杂的动态计算与重算。项目前期走单机 All-in-One 部署（ Docker
），后续向分布式集群演进。

核心技术栈： Go 、ClickHouse 、Redis 、MySQL 、Vue 3 （接受纯后端，懂前端图表全栈最佳）

技术能力要求： Go (核心)：精通高并发编程（ Goroutine ）与异步任务调度。能设计并实现极其稳定的 API
拉取管道，熟练处理限流、重试以及“动态降频/休眠”等复杂调度逻辑。

ClickHouse (核心)：精通海量时序数据的底层表结构设计、物化视图与窗口函数。能手写并极致优化复杂的聚合 SQL ，解决千万级数据重算的毫秒级响应。

中间件与存储：熟练运用 Redis 构建轻量级任务队列与高速缓存；熟练使用 MySQL 处理常规业务流转。

前端展示：熟悉 Vue 3 及 ECharts 等复杂图表数据的可视化呈现。

合作硬性要求： 追求极效：现在都讲究效率，需要你平时就习惯并熟练使用 AI 辅助编程，懂得用 AI 来大幅跑通样板代码、提高开发进度。

C/C++/ Qt 客户端：Android Java ━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━━ 职责

用 Go 重写整个服务端 WebSocket 信令与命令通道 有弱网环境优化经验（高延迟、高丢包、低带宽场景） REST API （用户认证、设备管理）
数据库层（ MySQL / PostgreSQL ） 集成 WebRTC 基于 pion/webrtc 实现音视频流和屏幕共享 信令服务设计与实现 TURN
/ STUN 部署和调优 桌面端重写（ AI 辅助为主） 将现有 [VB.NET](http://VB.NET) 控制面板用 C / C++ / Qt 重写
AI 负责主要代码翻译，你负责架构设计和审核 Android 端适配 集成 WebRTC SDK ，替换原有的数据传输方式,主要是媒体流对接 硬性要求 Go
实际项目经验 2 年以上 有 WebRTC 落地项目经验（了解 ICE / SDP / TURN 完整流程） C++ 能独立开发，不仅仅是能读 熟练使用
AI 编程工具（ CodeX / Claude 等） 能独立做技术决策，不需要手把手指导 加分项

用过 pion/webrtc 或 pion/turn 有音视频 / 流媒体开发经验 Android 原生开发经验 有远程协作和自由职业经验 💰
合作方式与报酬

远程合作，时间自由安排 薪资私聊（不会低 另加提成） 长期合作关系，后续产品迭代持续有需求 具体报酬私聊，根据经验和交付质量定价，给得起。

现有的 [VB.NET](http://VB.NET) 和 PHP 都不打算维护了，目标是服务端全部迁到 Go ，桌面端用 C++/Qt 重做，通信层加上
WebRTC 。等于从零搭一套新架构，旧代码只是参考逻辑用。

over 3 Billion calls annually, 100,000+ developers globally, and industry

### About This Role:

LiveKit is seeking an exceptional **Growth Marketing Manager** to drive
awareness, adoption, and retention of our platform through top-of-funnel
campaigns, lifecycle marketing, and community programs. This role will focus
on **merchandising and distributing content** created by PMM, DevRel, and our
community, as well as designing campaigns that support our self-serve funnel.

As our first dedicated Growth Marketing hire (based in the Bay Area), you’ll
have a broad mandate: from running digital experiments and lifecycle campaigns
to managing our community programs and corporate social channels. You’ll also
work cross-functionally with Revenue Operations to refine inbound lead scoring
and optimize our funnel. The expectation is for you to test, learn, and scale
the tactics that drive LiveKit’s growth, both through organic and paid
efforts.

### **What You’ll Do**

  * Partner with PMM and DevRel to **distribute and merchandise content** across the right channels, including creator, influencer, champion, and partner networks.

  * Run **top-of-funnel campaigns** to increase awareness of LiveKit and drive high-quality signups to our cloud platform.

  * Own and manage **community programs** in partnership with DevRel.

  * Manage LiveKit’s **corporate social media presence** , ensuring consistent brand voice and engagement.

  * Partner with RevOps to analyze inbound signups, refine lead qualification, and improve our **lead scoring model**.

  * Track and report on campaign performance, including **reach, conversion, and funnel impact**.

  * Support **developer events in the Bay Area** , including community meetups and partner activations.

  * Manage and optimize the **growth marketing budget** , allocating resources to the highest-ROI activities.

### **Who You Are**

  * Strong experience in **campaign management across multiple channels** , including email, paid social, organic social, and partnerships.

  * Comfortable with **marketing automation platforms** (e.g., HubSpot, Marketo) and **community management tools**.

  * Experience running **community-driven programs** , including referral initiatives and ambassador or creator partnerships.

  * Hands-on experience with **social media strategy and execution** a plus.

  * Creative and scrappy—able to test ideas quickly and scale what works.

  * Excellent cross-functional collaborator who enjoys working with Product Marketing, Developer Relations, and RevOps.

  * Based in the **San Francisco Bay Area** with the ability to support local events.

### **Our Commitments to You**

### **We offer**

descContent:
LiveKit is seeking a **Staff Developer Advocate** to help grow our presence
and deepen engagement with developers, with a strong focus on **events and
community building**. You’ll be the face of LiveKit in the Bay Area and
beyond, driving awareness with developers who may not yet know us, and
creating experiences that inspire them to build with real-time audio and
video.

This role is a hybrid of **content creation and event execution** : you’ll
organize and host events, speak at meetups and conferences, and also create
supporting content that extends the reach of those activities. You’ll bring
back insights from the community—trends, patterns, and narratives that are top
of mind for developers—and use them to inform our product, messaging, and
broader DevRel strategy.

### **What You’ll Do**

  * **Drive awareness of LiveKit** with new developer audiences, especially in the Bay Area where there is a significant opportunity to grow our presence.

  * **Plan, host, and participate in events** including meetups, hackathons, developer workshops, and conferences.

  * Partner with Marketing to **amplify events through digital channels** , ensuring broader reach and sustained impact.

  * Create **content from events** (recaps, demos, tutorials, blogs, social posts) to expand engagement beyond the room.

  * Serve as a **feedback loop for the company** , bringing back developer perspectives, industry trends, and emerging patterns to inform our product and community strategy.

  * **Represent LiveKit on stage and in community forums** , speaking authentically to developer audiences about our technology.

  * Help experiment with **new event formats and engagement tactics** , testing what resonates most with our audience.

  * Collaborate cross-functionally with DevRel, PMM, and Product to ensure developer narratives are **consistent, compelling, and authentic**.

### **Who You Are**

  * 2+ years of experience in **Developer Advocacy, Developer Relations, or Technical Evangelism** , with a strong emphasis on events and community engagement.

  * Comfortable being **outward-facing** —you enjoy speaking to groups, hosting sessions, and building relationships in developer communities.

  * Strong **technical communication skills** ; you can explain complex concepts in clear, engaging ways across presentations and written content.

  * Hands-on technical background (comfortable writing code samples, running demos, or building prototypes).

  * Experience planning and executing **developer events** (e.g., meetups, hackathons, workshops, or conference tracks).

  * Based in the **San Francisco Bay Area** , with willingness to travel for conferences and events.

  * Strong collaborator who can work cross-functionally with Marketing, Product, and Engineering.

  * Curious and empathetic—you love learning what matters most to developers and bringing those insights back to the team.

### Our Commitments to You

### We offer

  * An opportunity to build something truly impactful to the world

  * Competitive salary and equity package

  * Work anywhere in the world

  * Health, dental, and vision benefits

  * Flexible vacation policy

### Ready to Apply?

If you're passionate about championing developers in the realm of real-time
communications and want to make a significant impact at a high-growth company,
we'd love to hear from you. At LiveKit, your work as a Developer Advocate will
be instrumental in our growth and success, bridging the gap between our
technology and the developers who use it.

descContent:
### About LiveKit

LiveKit is building the infrastructure layer for the voice-driven era of
computing. Our platform gives developers everything they need to build, test,
deploy, scale, and observe agents in production. Founded in 2021, LiveKit
powers voice AI applications for OpenAI, xAI, Salesforce, Coursera, Spotify,
and thousands of others, collectively facilitating billions of calls each
year.

### About You

Most developer advocacy is a mile wide and an inch deep. Conference talks.
LinkedIn carousels. Tutorial repos that haven't been updated in two years.
That's not what we need.

LiveKit is infrastructure. Real-time media, WebRTC, voice AI agents — the
stuff developers reach for when they're building something that actually has
to work at scale. That means our content has to go deep. We need a developer
advocate who can build a working voice AI demo from scratch, articulate every
design decision in the README, and then explain the whole thing on camera in a
way that makes a developer say "I finally get it."

If you're someone who genuinely likes building things and teaching others how
they work — not because it's your job, but because you're the person who's
always been curious about how stuff works under the hood — this is your role.

You'll thrive as a Staff Developer Advocate – Content if you:

  * are obsessed with making the best developer experience for your readers and viewers

  * are known as the go-to person for tackling tough technical explanations

  * work hard and can build and ship demos fast

  * are focused on polish, depth, and quality over volume

  * are a fast learner, frequently picking up new languages, tools, and frameworks

The best way to impress us is with thoughtful ways you'd implement LiveKit,
and potentially tinkering with it 😊

### What You'll Do

  * Own a steady cadence of technical content: tutorials, blog posts, demo apps, video walkthroughs, and code examples — all built for developers who want the real story, not the pitch

  * Build and maintain working demos in the LiveKit Examples repo that developers actually use

  * Be an active, authentic presence in developer communities — Discord, Reddit, GitHub, Stack Overflow, X — answering questions, unblocking developers, and genuinely engaging

  * Represent LiveKit at conferences and meetups as needed, and contribute to the team’s virtual event presence (livestreams, webinars, live coding sessions)

  * Work closely with the DevRel and Marketing teams to distribute and amplify content to the right audiences

  * Surface what you're hearing from the community — product feedback, confusion points, common questions — and bring it back to the EPD and Marketing teams in a useful, actionable way

### Who You Are

  * You can write code and build working demos independently — you don’t need an engineer to build the thing you’re explaining

  * You have a proven track record of producing technical content at scale: tutorials, videos, or livestreams that drove real developer awareness or adoption

  * You communicate clearly and credibly in writing, on camera, and in front of a live audience

  * You’re genuinely curious about how things work — especially in voice AI and real-time infrastructure — and that curiosity comes through in your work

  * You’re self-directed and organized; you thrive when given creative freedom, not a content calendar handed down from above

### Nice to Have

  * Experience with WebRTC, real-time media, or audio/video infrastructure (you know what a STUN server is and you have opinions about it)

  * Voice AI or conversational AI background — you’ve built something with LLMs, TTS, or STT and learned things the hard way

  * Active open source contributor — you have a GitHub profile you’re proud of

  * Experience running live coding sessions, workshops, or hackathons where things don’t go perfectly and you handled it gracefully

  * In those school group projects, you did most of the work (:sigh:)

### Our Commitment to You

  * An opportunity to build something truly impactful to the world

  * Contribute to open source alongside world-class engineers

  * Competitive salary and equity package

  * Health, dental, and vision benefits

  * Flexible vacation policy

postTitle: 反转又反转，远程工作还是没了。难绷...
descContent:
OP iOS + Flutter 程序员，去年接了个远程 iOS
工作，属于那种想快速上线的，当时应该是找了挺多的外包，年前赶出来了一个版本，然后那个时候就通知了一部分人合作结束了。

当时跟我沟通的是年后要继续跟我合作，当时也还没当回事，毕竟也知道这种可能就是短期的。

年后 2
月下旬那边人事联系我说，打算今年跟我签订一年的劳务合同。由于中间牵扯到税比较高，那边一直没有确定好跟我们这几个外包人员的具体支打款方式，就一直在确认中，合同也就一直没有签订。这期间我还光速办理了个体户以及开了公户，想着对公打款开发票，报税会少很多。

周五下午，项目负责人突然在群里说外包人员整体开个会，就有一种不太好的预感，会议上说暂时不需要那么多人员了，到今天应该就到一段落了。这两天人事会通知你们个人是继续合作还是终止合作，让该交接的都交接一下。

交接的时候负责人单独跟我说：后续计划到时候人事会联系你，队伍里其他人对你还是比较认可的。

我一听，这是要有戏啊，还挺开心。想着这把稳了。

等到晚上的时候，人事联系说：计划有变，终止合作，后续有需要合作优先考虑。

.....

.....

.....

哎。蚌埠住了

postTitle: [远程][外企] Atria 招聘 测试兼职/前端/产品
descContent:
## 公司简介

Atria 是一家基于人工智能的广告创意管理平台，致力于帮助营销人员更高效地创作高表现广告，从而提升 Meta 和 TikTok
等平台的广告投放效果。我们服务于众多知名公司，包括 Perplexity, ClickUp, Beehiiv, True Classic 。

公司已完成天使轮融资，创立三年多，目前公司收月入远大于每月各方面支出，营收还在不断高速增长中。

## 工作地点： 远程办公

## 团队介绍

  * 研发团队都是中国人，日常开发用中文交流即可。
  * 全远程工作，工作地点无要求，最好在亚太时区。
  * 研发 10 人，产品设计 3 人，团队成员主要来自腾讯、亚马逊和微软等国内外知名大厂。
  * 积极拥抱 AI ，公司给研发产品设计团队都提供 Codex 和 Claude Code 账号。

## 招聘岗位

### 1\. 兼职测试工程师（每周≥3 天）

职责：

  * 根据设计稿与 PRD 设计并执行功能、兼容性、性能等测试。
  * 覆盖用户流程所有分支与 UI 缺陷。
  * 准确记录、跟踪 bug ，推动修复并验证效果。
  * 输出测试用例、测试计划、测试报告等文档。
  * 执行回归测试，维护质量稳定。
  * 协同开发/产品/设计参与需求审查与风险沟通。
  * （可选）参与测试自动化脚本编写/维护。

要求：

  * 具备至少基础手动测试经验，能独立设计执行测试。
  * 具备逻辑性强、细节敏感、沟通协作良好。
  * 熟悉缺陷管理工具（如 JIRA 、Bugzilla ），能撰写测试文档。
  * 具备基础的英文读写能力，能阅读英文网站与文档。
  * 具备自动化测试基础或脚本语言能力优先。
  * 熟悉测试流程与策略优先。
  * 有 SaaS/敏捷/远程协作经验者优先。

### 2\. 前端工程师（产品方向）

职责

  * 负责 Atria 核心产品功能的前端设计与开发，交付高质量、可维护的用户体验 
  * 将模糊的产品意图、复杂的业务逻辑与 AI 能力，转化为清晰的交互流程和前端实现方案 
  * 深度参与从需求理解、方案设计、界面实现到上线迭代的完整闭环 
  * 使用 AI-native 的开发方式提升产品迭代速度，并探索更高效的人机协作工作流 
  * 在小团队环境下独立推动复杂问题的拆解、落地和持续改进 

要求

  * 有扎实的前端工程能力，能够独立负责复杂产品功能的设计与开发 
  * 对复杂业务逻辑有较强理解力，能够快速建立系统性认知并转化为合理的产品交互 
  * 有较强的产品意识，不只是“接需求开发”，而是能主动识别问题、补全方案并推动决策 
  * 有基本的设计判断和体验意识，能够在缺少完整设计稿的情况下做出靠谱、克制、有完成度的界面 
  * 具备良好的沟通能力，能够清晰表达技术与产品判断 
  * 能用英文进行基本的技术协作与文档沟通 

### 3\. 产品工程师

职责

  * 负责产品问题从想法提出到最终上线交付的全流程推进 
  * 将用户需求、业务目标和复杂业务逻辑，转化为清晰的产品方案与设计决策 
  * 面向 B2B SaaS 场景，设计并构建直观、易用的产品流程与交互体验 
  * 与创始人及团队成员紧密协作，持续打磨需求、梳理优先级并推动执行 

要求

  * 具备优秀的产品感知力，能够在有限指引下做出高质量判断 
  * 具备较强的 UX 理解与流程设计能力，尤其擅长处理复杂、逻辑密集型产品 
  * 有较强的主人翁意识，能够适应快速变化的创业环境 
  * 具备足够的技术深度，能够独立交付高质量的产品体验 
  * 能够使用英语进行技术协作与文档沟通 

### 应聘方式

请发送您的简历和个人作品至： tian@tryatria.com ，邮件标题：岗位 + 名字，如：前端开发 静静。

PS1:
前端工程师和产品工程师两个岗位侧重不一样，前端工程师主要还是看前端能力（如果前端能力很强，却只是想做执行，不想涉及产品设计的部分，那就不适合我们团队；但只要有这个意愿和主动性，愿意往那方面发展，就可以）。产品工程师需要前端能力过关（因为最终交付质量不能有问题），但是有一定的产品设计能力。这两个岗位都有一轮产品面试，产品工程师有一轮设计笔试。

PS2: 上次帖子收到很多朋友的投递，由于我们是个小团队，简历评审和面试还在有序安排中，请耐心等待。

descContent:
### About Us

Circle is building the world’s leading all-in-one platform for online
communities. We make it possible for creators, coaches, educators, and
businesses to bring together their audience with engaging discussions, live
streams, events, chat, courses, and payments — all in one place, all under
their own brand.

We’re proud to be a fully remote company of around 200 (and growing!) team
members from 30+ countries around the world. We seek exceptional individuals
around the world, set them up to do the best work of their lives, and in turn,
create a meaningful impact in their own lives. We don't track hours, but we do
manage for high expectations very closely. We collaborate across time zones,
are highly async, and like to document a lot.

Twice a year, we bring the whole company together in beautiful places around
the world for our company offsites. So far, we’ve hosted offsites in Turkey,
Portugal, Mexico, Thailand, Colombia, Italy, Ireland, and more, with still
more to come!

Check out our [Careers](https://careers.circle.so/) page for more about
working at Circle.

### About the role

We’re hiring a Payroll & Benefits Coordinator to help support and scale one of
the most critical functions at Circle. Today, payroll and benefits are owned
by a single team member — and as we continue to grow, we need additional
support and redundancy to ensure accuracy, continuity, and a great employee
experience.

This role will work closely with our Senior Payroll & Benefits Specialist to
execute day-to-day payroll and benefits operations while building a strong
understanding of the full function. You’ll play a key role in keeping things
running smoothly.

### What you'll be doing

  * Support end-to-end payroll processing across multiple states and countries using Remote
  * Review and validate timekeeping data, including hours worked and PTO, ensuring accuracy before payroll runs
  * Process payroll changes including new hires, compensation updates, terminations, bonuses, and adjustments
  * Administer employee benefits programs (health, dental, vision, 401(k), etc.), including enrollments and life event changes
  * Manage contractor lifecycle operations, including agreements (SOWs), onboarding, and invoice schedules
  * Coordinate offboarding processes, including system updates, benefits terminations, and cross-functional alignment
  * Serve as a point of contact for employee questions related to payroll and benefits, and support internal documentation and process improvements

### What you'll need to be successful

  * Strong alignment with our values, [find our values on our career page](https://circle.so/careers) if you haven’t read up on them yet
  * 4+ years of experience in payroll, benefits, or a related function, ideally in a high-growth or distributed company
  * Strong understanding of payroll fundamentals, including taxes, deductions, and compliance basics
  * Experience working with payroll systems and HRIS tools ([Remote.com](http://Remote.com) experience is a plus), including exposure to international payroll
  * Advanced spreadsheet skills (e.g., lookups) and a high level of accuracy and attention to detail
  * Strong organizational skills with the ability to manage recurring deadlines and handle sensitive information with discretion
  * Exceptional written and verbal communication skills in English ([CEFR C2 or equivalent](https://englishonline.britishcouncil.org/free-english-level-test-cefr-2/)), as most collaboration at Circle happens asynchronously

### Bonus points

  * Experience in a remote-first or distributed company
  * Familiarity with multi-state payroll requirements in the U.S.
  * Exposure to benefits compliance (ACA, COBRA, etc.)

### $90,000 - $110,000 USD per year

_The cash compensation range shown is a starting point. In addition to equity,
benefits and perks, your cash compensation is subject to an annual review and
increase on a once per year basis._

### The fun stuff

  * Fully remote: work from anywhere in the world!
  * Autonomy and trust to do your job: we care about outcomes over everything else.
  * Paid time away: all employees are given 35 days of PTO annually. We also offer a paid sabbatical after 5 years.
  * Generous U.S. benchmarked compensation and startup equity no matter where you are in the world.*
  * Awesome medical coverage with 100% coverage for you and your family, or medical reimbursement options where applicable!*
  * Parental leave for parents expanding their family, or just starting one.
  * Home office stipend to help you get up and running.
  * Learning & development stipend to help you level up your professional skills.
  * Annual bonus potential for roles that don't already receive variable income or commission.
  * Company retreats: Twice a year, the Circle team gets together for a fully paid company retreat in incredible places around the world! We’ve had past retreats in Colombia, Portugal, and Mexico, with more planned on the horizon.
  * Check out our [Careers](https://careers.circle.so/) page for more.

*_Your role, location and unique circumstance may affect this._

### **Candidate Safety & Interview Process Notice**

At Circle, the safety and trust of our candidates is extremely important to
us. Unfortunately, recruiting fraud is increasingly common in the job market,
and bad actors sometimes impersonate companies or employees.

  
To help protect you, here’s what you can expect from our hiring process:

**How Our Process Works**

  * All applications are submitted through our official applicant tracking system (Greenhouse).
  * If selected to move forward, you may be invited to record a short introductory video, or directly into a live interview.
  * All live interviews are conducted face-to-face over video (Zoom or Google Meet) with a member of the Circle team.
  * We do **not** conduct text-only interviews.
  * We do **not** conduct interviews via chat apps or messaging platforms.
  * We do **not** use AI bots to interview candidates.

**Official Communication Channels**

  * All official communication from Circle will come from [no-reply@circle.co](mailto:no-reply@us.greenhouse-mail.io), or an email address ending in @circle.co or @circle.so.
  * We will never contact you from unofficial domains (such as “.team”, “.careers”, or similar variations).
  * We will never request sensitive personal information early in the process, or ask for payment of any kind.

If you receive a suspicious message claiming to be from Circle, please do not
respond.

  
We appreciate your vigilance, and look forward to connecting with you through
our official channels.

### Diversity, Equity & Inclusion

As a fully-remote international company, diversity is baked into our DNA.
Here’s how our CEO, Sid Yadav, frames our hiring mission: “let’s find talent
in underserved and under-represented corners of the world, set them up to do
the best work of their lives, and in turn, change their life.” To achieve this
hiring mission, we offer competitive U.S. benchmarked compensation no matter
where someone’s located in the world, and we proactively seek candidates who
expand representation of backgrounds, cultures and lived experiences in our
teams.

### Equal Employment Opportunity

Circle is an equal opportunity employer and as such, we do not discriminate on
the basis of race, color, religion, sex, sexual orientation, gender identity,
national origin, age, disability, or any other characteristic protected by
applicable laws. If you require any accommodations during the recruitment
process, please let us know and we will work with you to meet your needs.

### How We Use Candidate Data

At Circle, we are committed to protecting your personal information. As a job
applicant, the personal data you provide to us is collected and processed in
accordance with the **General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR)** in the EU
and the **California Consumer Privacy Act (CCPA)**. This notice outlines the
types of personal information we collect, the purpose for collecting it, and
your rights.

**Information We Collect:** We collect the following categories of personal
information from job applicants:

  * Contact information (such as name, email address, phone number)
  * Employment history and qualifications
  * Education history
  * References and any other information you choose to share with us during the application process

**Purpose of Collection:** We collect this information for the following
purposes:

  * To assess your qualifications and suitability for the position
  * To communicate with you during the recruitment process
  * To comply with legal and regulatory obligations

**Your Rights Under GDPR and CCPA:** You have the following rights regarding
your personal information:

  * The right to request access to the personal information we hold about you.
  * The right to request the deletion of your personal information, subject to certain legal exceptions.
  * The right to opt out of the sale of your personal information (Note: We do not sell personal information).

For more information about how we handle your personal data or to exercise
your rights, please refer to our full [Privacy
Policy](https://circle.so/privacy).

By submitting your application, you acknowledge that you have read and
understood this privacy notice.

### Responsibilities

* Manage, mentor, and grow a team of iOS engineers, including hiring, onboarding, and career development, while fostering a high-performance and collaborative culture.

* Contribute to the codebase and provide technical leadership across architecture, system design, and key engineering decisions.

* Partner with product, design, and data to define, scope, and deliver high-impact features, owning execution from concept through launch.

* Establish and uphold a high bar for engineering quality, including code standards, testing practices, and long-term maintainability.

* Operate as a player/coach with an expected ~50% hands-on engineering contribution.

### Requirements

* 6+ years of experience managing high-performing, mobile engineering teams.

* 10+ years of professional iOS development experience, with strong proficiency in Swift and experience across the iOS ecosystem, including Apple Payments.

* Experience building and shipping mobile applications to scaled audiences, with strong understanding of architecture, performance optimization, and user experience.

* Proven ability to lead projects from concept through launch, balancing speed and quality, and to collaborate effectively with cross-functional partners to deliver business impact.

* Experience hiring, mentoring, and developing engineers, with strong communication and leadership skills.

* An AI-forward mindset, with curiosity about applying emerging technologies to improve developer and product experiences.

Check out our [Careers](https://careers.circle.so/) page for more about

### Sales at Circle

Circle is unlike any other software company in the world. We've scaled to
**$50M+ ARR while achieving profitability** —a feat driven in part by our
sales team's ability to move upmarket and close increasingly larger deals
sizes, while our world class product led growth function captures the rest.

We're on a clear path from $50M to $250M ARR, over the next few years and our
sales team’s ability to sell our highest tier plans to our core customer and
new customers types is a big piece of the puzzle.

Every seller works at Circle because we have the best product. We win because
of our product - nothing touches it.

### Our sales team

In many ways, we're still a startup with the energy and opportunity that comes
with it, while building the foundation of a world-class sales organization.
We’re small, growing - the perfect place to carve our your career.

**A bit about our Sales team:**

  * **Servant leadership culture** \- We're obsessed with enabling our reps for success and creating the best environment for growth.
  * **Diverse customer base** \- You'll sell to budding solopreneurs and enterprise companies, balancing transactional deals with longer consultative sales cycles.
  * **Growth mindset** \- We're looking for people who invest in themselves relentlessly.
  * **Genuinely customer-obsessed** \- When we say it, we mean it. We solve problems with customer experience and customer value first, even when it means walking away from a deal.
  * **We work hard** \- It's sales. There will be highs and lows. You get the freedom to run your own business and the pressure of hitting your number and climbing the leaderboard.
  * **High-performance culture** \- We hold a high bar and expect both effort and outcomes. There's pressure in that, but you also get to be part of a winning team.
  * **Tech-enabled** \- We're hyper-focused on equipping our teams with cutting-edge tools and technology. We want people excited to lean into new tech.
  * **Competitive compensation** \- We pay well for top performers.

### Where we work

Circle is a 100% remote, distributed company. This team is fully distributed.
You'll need to be a self-starter who delivers high-quality work with speed,
then enjoys your personal life. We gather twice yearly for company offsites to
build connection and align on our vision.

We're generally looking for people in **North American time zones** for this
role.

### The impact you will have

**Drive Revenue Growth**

  * Close $20K-$100K ACV new business deals by managing prospects from trial through contract signature.
  * Execute expansion opportunities by managing a book of existing customers after you’ve sold previously.

**Execute Consultative Sales**

  * Run discovery conversations that uncover customer needs, challenges, and success criteria
  * Deliver customized demos that showcase Circle's value proposition for diverse use cases across creators, brands, and enterprises
  * Navigate complex buying processes, engaging multiple stakeholders and decision-makers
  * Build compelling business cases and ROI models for executive stakeholders
  * Develop mutual evaluation plans and success criteria with prospects

**Continuously Learn and Improve**

  * Stay current on product releases and understand how customers leverage new features (it's changing daily)
  * Educate yourself by reading, listening to podcasts, and learning from teammates
  * Go above and beyond your quota to help your teammates and the company succeed

**Be a great Teammate**

  * Contribute your expertise to evolve our sales methodology and playbooks
  * Share wins, losses, and learnings openly to help the entire team improve
  * Jump in to help teammates when they need support, even when you're crushing your own number
  * Bring your voice to the table—your experience will help refine our sales processes
  * Celebrate others' success as much as your own
  * Create an environment where everyone can thrive, not just survive

### What we're looking for

**Required Experience & Skills**

  * **5+ years of closing experience** in B2B SaaS or technology sales with $30K-$50K ACV deals
  * **Proven track record** of exceeding quota and ranking as a top performer
  * **Consultative selling expertise** with ability to conduct deep discovery and build value-based business cases
  * **Proficiency in English** at CEFR C2 / ILR Level 5 (spoken, written, reading)
  * **Strong alignment** with [Circle's values](https://circle.so/careers)

**Core Competencies**

  * **Relationship building** \- You quickly establish rapport and find common ground with diverse prospects
  * **Business Acumen** \- You understand what makes a business run, and how to find the risks and the opportunities.
  * **Internal locus of control** \- You’re in control of your outcomes. You hold yourself to a high bar.
  * **Intellectual curiosity** \- You research prospects, ask thoughtful questions, and continuously learn
  * **Technical aptitude** \- You're comfortable with SaaS platforms and automation tools (Zapier, etc.)
  * **Data-driven mindset** \- You analyze metrics to understand performance and optimize your approach
  * **Exceptional organization** \- You juggle multiple deals while maintaining meticulous attention to detail
  * **Customer-first mentality** \- You prioritize fit over commission, disqualifying prospects when Circle isn't right for them.
  * **Outstanding written communication** \- You craft clear, persuasive emails and internal documentation

### $150,000 - $190,000 USD OTE (depending on experience)

_This role includes variable compensation at 50% base, 50% variable._

_The cash compensation range shown is a starting point. In addition to equity,
benefits and perks, your cash compensation is subject to an annual review and
increase on a once per year basis._

member takes full ownership of their projects, from scoping and execution to
postmortem. If you're seeking end-to-end ownership of your work, you've come

Working on the **Data Science** Functional Team, you'll drive product and

  * You have advanced SQL and query optimization skills, familiarity with columnar databases like BigQuery, Clickhouse, Redshift, or Druid; experience with a BI tool like Tableau or PowerBI is a plus.
